channel.title: Codes and Tags
channel.description: Codes and Tags is the blog created by Edwin Torres to share him experiences being Developer, Traveler and Teacher. Front-End

item.title: Creating my blog with Gatsby and Github Pages
item.description: How to create your own blog using Gatsby and Github Pages.
item.dc:creator: Edwin Torres

item.title: Learning to learn
item.description: These are my personal notes in the Udemy Course, Learning to Learn by Andrei Neagogie.
item.dc:creator: Edwin Torres
